Localization.Description: Process start and privilege escalation using the dynamic linker ld.so

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} escalated privileges using the dynamic linker ld.so on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} used the dynamic linker ld.so to exit the restricted environment on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} used the dynamic linker ld.so to exit the restricted environment on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} escalated privileges using the dynamic linker ld.so on host {event_src.host}
